description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a C++ static analysis and test workflow on multiple Linux distributions using the default stage. Define five jobs named arch, debian, debian-testing, fedora and ubuntu, each using the Docker image cppit/jucipp:<distro> matching the job name. In every job execute the script: mkdir build; cd build; scan-build cmake ..; scan-build --status-bugs make -j$(nproc); rm -r *; cmake -DBUILD_TESTING=1 ..; make -j$(nproc); CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 make test. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
